response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid software development experience across multiple stacks and some informal leadership through workshops, training, and founding GISCollective, but the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no engineering manager titles, and no work on developer tools at the scale described (compilers, build systems, test automation infrastructure). The role explicitly requires 2+ years of people management and 3+ years building developer tools for a large mobile platform ecosystem, neither of which is demonstrated. Mobile experience is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Demonstrated teaching/mentoring via Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, and workshops
Strong testing/TDD culture and tooling background (Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner)
concerns: No formal people management or engineering manager experience on resume
Lacks developer-tools-at-scale experience (build systems, compilers, CI infra for large mobile org)
Minimal recent mobile platform work; mobile experience is ~1 year from a decade ago

key_factors.factor: Long tenure as senior IC with mentoring and training work
